omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Key Assurances about VPN - Super Unlimited Proxy • VPN Super Unlimited Proxy does not record your VPN browsing activities in any way that can be associated with you. When you use a VPN connection, we do not store any information that identifies what you browse, view, or do online via that VPN connection. The exception is when you choose to communicate with us (such as via chat or email) over a VPN connection and choose to identify yourself to us.
